label: Fixed
items: Plant search no longer drops Verdantly results when they arrive before Perenual results

label: Improved
items: Plant name searches are now cached and shared across all users — repeated searches return instantly without hitting the AI again
Perenual and Verdantly search results are cached for 24 hours — finding plants is faster across the app, including the planner's procure step
"Show more AI suggestions" pre-generates a full batch upfront — clicking through pages never makes a second AI call
Faster initial load — map, canvas, and chart libraries now load only on the pages that need them
